purpose: Provide a reader-facing packet for independently replaying selected transition receipts and comparing reconstructed outcomes against the public ledger.

replay_scope.reason: T13 and T14 are the current receipt-backed evidence elements and therefore form the safest public replay target.
not_in_scope: Full autonomous replay of every transition element

replay_steps.name: Open the verification guide
checks: The verification guide identifies public JSON surfaces
The guide lists the current verification path

replay_steps.name: Open the receipt backing verifier
checks: Receipt-backed evidence is limited to current backed elements

replay_steps.name: Open transition evidence
checks: T13 evidence level is 5/5 or receipt-backed
T14 evidence level is 5/5 or receipt-backed
Other elements remain at their published evidence levels

replay_steps.name: Open the experimental ledger summary
checks: Recent T13 and T14 ledger rows are visible
Ledger rows match the public evidence story

replay_steps.name: Compare replay claim to release state
checks: Current release remains MS-011 until MS-012 links are live
MS-012 is the next pending milestone
Replay packet path is publicly reachable after upload

replay_claim: A reader can independently inspect the receipt-backed evidence layer by following the replay packet from guide to receipt backing verifier, transition evidence, ledger summary, and release index.
unlock_condition: MS-012 can be marked released after transition-replay-packet.html is live and linked from the verification guide, release index, milestones, development status, release snapshot, transition table, and research landing.

next_pending_milestone_after_release.unlock_condition: A public demonstration shows at least one selected receipt replay path from receipt material to reconstructed result and ledger comparison.
